title: Rearrange task tracks in Gantt view?

posts.author: sdbbs (sdbbs)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am not sure if my problem is the same as Gantt View Widget sorting in which case there is unfortunately no solution; but here goes:

I use Firefox, and I have gotten this state:

image918×149 2.51 KB

… and I would like to rearrange the horizontal task “tracks” like this:

image918×149 2.51 KB

I’ve been trying to drag tracks around in the UI, but that does not work.

Is it possible to rearrange tracks in Gantt view as I want them?
